task_plans.title: Deploy new-design-system react package
task_plans.first_step: Ask Tino for the deployment key.
steps: Ask Tino for the deployment key.
Spawn an agent to clone an existing deploy CI.
Rewrite the deploy CI to match the new-design-system React package repository.
Run the deploy workflow and verify the package is deployed.
risks: Deployment key access depends on Tino.
CI template may need repository-specific package manager, build, or publish adjustments.
task_plans.stopping_point: Stop when the package is deployed, or if access is blocked, record the exact missing key/request state for checkout.
